rent.note: furnished 1BR in nomad area (Mitte, Prenzlauer Berg, Neukölln); €1,200-1,700 city center

utilities.note: electric + water + internet; German utilities run high in winter

groceries.note: home cooking; Aldi/Lidl budget €240-360/mo; mid estimate

diningOut.note: Berlin has good cheap eats; kebabs ~€4, mid restaurant €12-18/meal

simData.note: SIM-only plan (Aldi Talk / Congstar) unlimited data ~€15-20/mo

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. Berlin medium-term furnished lets are stable year-round.

evidence.claim: Berlin solo monthly cost including rent
evidence.quote: A solo digital nomad should estimate monthly costs of $1,010 (excluding rent) and $2,445 including rent
One-bedroom apartment: €1,000–€1,400, higher in Mitte or Prenzlauer Berg; 1-bedroom apartments in the city center: €1,200–€1,700 per month
average weekly supermarket shop costs €60–€90 for a single person, which translates to roughly €240–€360 per month
Coworking spaces like Mindspace, St. Oberholz, and Betahaus cost €200–€450/month
